mapper.select:
select
from sys_user where username = #{username} limit 1

select
from sys_user where email = #{email} limit 1

select
from sys_user where mobile = #{mobile} limit 1

SELECT DISTINCT sur.user_id FROM sys_user_role sur WHERE sur.role_id IN
#{roleId}

select su.user_id, su.username, su.nickname, su.sex, su.mobile, su.email, su.avatar, su.enabled, su.create_by, su.update_by, su.pwd_reset_time, su.create_time, su.update_time from sys_user su left join sys_user_dept sud on su.user_id = sud.user_id
and su.username like concat('%', #{username}, '%')
and su.nickname like concat('%', #{nickname}, '%')
and su.mobile like concat('%', #{mobile}, '%')
and su.enabled = #{enabled}
and sud.dept_id = #{deptId}
order by su.user_id desc
mapper.delete:
delete from sys_user where user_id in
#{userId}
